title: Narayana Nethralaya | Best Eye Hospital in Bangalore, India
description: Narayana Nethralaya is one of the best eye hospitals in Bangalore, India, offering world-class eye care treatment with experienced eye specialist doctors.

Download RDC Recipe Book Holistic Wellness Research Center Pledge Your Eyes The Highest Google Reviewed Eye Hospital In The World The Best Eye Hospital In Karnataka Ranked 1 st For The 15th Consecutive Year Among The top 3 Hospitals For Eye Care In IndIa Request Appointment Call Us Our Specialities View All Narayana Nethralaya Super Specialty Eye Hospital in Bangalore offers a comprehensive range of world-class eye care services. Our specialized departments cater to basic as well as complex vision needs with personalised treatment plans. Cataract Surgery Cataract is the leading cause of age-related preventable blindness worldwide, but early diagnosis and treatment can restore clear vision. Know More Refractive Surgery Refractive surgery offers a painless, quick and safe solution to free you from glasses and contact lenses. Know More Vitreoretinal Services The retina acts as the eye’s natural screen, our vitreoretinal services address conditions affecting the retina and vitreous with precision. Know More Pediatric Services Healthy vision in childhood is vital & early eye checks can prevent lifelong visual challenges and support overall vision development. Know More Our Locations Explore All locations Find a Narayana Nethralaya hospital near you and experience our top-quality eye care services at a convenient location. Rajajinagar Bommasandra Indiranagar Bannerghatta Road Whitefield Satellite Centre @ Electronic City “We all seek happiness by receiving, but true happiness lies not in receiving but in giving.” - Dr. K. Bhujang Shetty “We all seek happiness by receiving, but true happiness lies not in receiving but in giving.” - Dr. K. Bhujang Shetty A compassionate healer. A visionary leader. A dreamer. A legend. Dr. K. Bhujang Shetty was a pioneer who transformed eye care in India with his unwavering dedication to his work and his patients. As the Founding Chairman of Narayana Nethralaya, he not only propelled Indian ophthalmology onto the global stage but also redefined accessible and quality eye care for all. Beyond medical excellence, his legacy shines through his extensive charitable work—bringing sight to the underprivileged, leading major philanthropic endeavors,and ensuring that financial constraints never stood between a patient and treatment. His life was a testament to passion, perseverance, and the power of the human spirit, proving that true greatness lies in serving others. Why choose Narayana Nethralaya Compassionate and personalised patient care At NN, the comfort and care of our patients is at the core of all our activities and processes. We treat each patient as a family member and constantly strive to go beyond treating a disease. We also make sure to educate our patients about their visual problems so they can make an informed decision about their treatment options. Cutting-Edge Technology & Research NN is equipped with a fleet of modern equipment, ranging from advanced diagnostic tools to state-of-the-art operation theatres. We have earned a reputation for technical excellence and leveraging cutting-edge technology, allowing our doctors to perform complex surgeries with enhanced precision, control, and safety—resulting in faster recovery and greater comfort for our patients. We take pride in offering the best available technology to all. Quality Eye Care at Affordable Costs Four out of our five hospitals are accredited by NABH (National Accreditation Board for Hospitals and Healthcare Providers), which represents the highest benchmark for healthcare quality in India. Through continuous process improvements, we have enhanced patient satisfaction while maintaining pocket-friendly pricing—making high-quality eye care accessible to all sections of the society. Experienced and Skilled Experts Our team includes experienced doctors, nursing staff, optometrists, technicians, counsellors, and support staff who work collaboratively before, during, and after treatment to ensure optimal healing and patient outcomes. We regularly conduct structured clinical and soft skill training programs to continuously enhance our team's capabilities, thereby positively impacting the overall delivery of eye care. Our Reviews View Reviews See what our patients are saying about their experiences and how our dedicated team has made a difference in their eye care journey. ★★★★★ Everything in this facility is world class The hospital is extremely well run with well defined processes. We literally didn’t have to wait at any counter or seek for any help as everything was automatic and help staff continued to guide us. Dr. Naren Shetty performed the surgery and he was extremely meticulous and courteous in his work. The surgery went extremely well and even the post-op care was taken of. Everything in this facility is world class. Sudhanshu Singh ★★★★★ You can be assured that you are in safe hands. I underwent LASIK laser surgery at Narayana Nethralaya Bangalore, RajajiNagar in July 2023, and I am writing this review after almost 1.5 years. I used to have very high prescription power and couldn’t see anything clearly beyond four feet. It was always a nightmare wondering what would happen if I lost my spectacles after leaving the house. Since the surgery, I am able to see everything clearly. Sometimes, I still can’t believe that I’m able to see distant objects with just my bare eyes. Sowmya Reddygari ★★★★★ Dr Naren Shetty is so humble and down to earth person Dr Naren Shetty Performed cataract for both my parents in a span of one month with world class treatment. He is so humble and down to earth person with so much of empathy and professionalism. Thanks to the staff as they are very well organised and systematic Dr. Sharina Thomas is great doctor to consult! She assessed the issue clinically and suggested for further treatment. Thank you Prashanth P ★★★★★ My son was treated for Keratoconus by Dr. Rohit Shetty My son had Keratoconus surgery under Dr. Rohit Shetty last week. He is feeling much better now and our experience with NN goes back more than a decade, as expected it was great. I would thank the Doctors and the supporting staff for their kindness and systematic planning in guiding us through the process. Thanks, Saravanan A ★★★★★ I wish I knew about this hospital sooner I underwent silk surgery from Dr.Rohit shetty sir, it was not painful and I wish I knew about this hospital sooner ,so that I can done the surgery long ago. The hospital and the staffs were very friendly and I have known so many things about my eyes I had not known before. I recommend this place to all who are looking for lasik surgery. Ahmed Hassan ★★★★★ I thank Narayana Nethralaya for giving me the vision back I have undergone the LASIK surgery under Dr Rohit shetty sir on the 3rd of December 2024. There was a lot of fear before undergoing surgery, but once I entered into the OT the assurance offered by the doctor and the staff relieved my nervousness a lot and today the next day after the surgery, the vision is becoming completely clear and I really want to thank Narayana Nethralaya for giving me the vision back which I had thought would have never happened. I also want to bow my head with gratitude to Dr Rohit shetty and the staff of the Narayana Nethralaya for treating me with kindness and compassion. Overall, a huge thanks to Narayana Nethralaya, people who are suffering from some problems regarding their eye sights are most welcome here and get their treatments. Its a 100% guaranteed operation. Bharath D.R Dasarahalli ★★★★★ Dr Naren Shetty is an amazing doctor Dr Naren Shetty is an amazing doctor. highly qualified and very caring and supportive to the patients. The support staff is well trained and very helpful. The process from the time of entering the hospital till the discharge was very smooth. The surgery was successful and was almost painless. The doctor’s involvement throughout the process was very attentive. He gave enough time to understand our queries and gave solutions with lot of patience. Me and my family are very much satisfied with the overall management in the hospital and wish all the best to the hospital and Dr Naren Shetty and support staff. Vibhawari Dhakharia ★★★★★ The service I received here was wonderful The service I received here was wonderful and I would like to thank Dr Anand vinekar his efforts only saved my baby eyes great attention Well counselling done Thanks to Doctor Sushma Sush ★★★★★ The hospital process is seamless Dr. RAVIKRISHNA is very polite and answers all the questions asked, besides being a thorough expert in cataract surgery. The hospital process is seamless and the staff are kind enough to guide us through the process, without making us wait endlessly. Uday Vasudev ★★★★★ The hospital stands out in terms of patient care Very good experience with Dr. Vishma Prabhu.. The hospital stands out in terms of patient care and hospitality. ThanksVery good experience with Dr. Vishma Prabhu.. The hospital stands out in terms of patient care and hospitality. Thanks SG ★★★★★ Your Faith shall Heal You Your FAITH shall HEAL U…….Dr. Ravi Krishna Sir did a wonderful cataract surgery for my father and Dr. Sathi Devi A.V Madam is doing excellent in handling of glaucoma conditions since years together for my father with angle closure glaucoma and Dr. Padmamalini M madam is doing superb regular follow up and treatment for my dad in Uveitis and ocular immunology services. Hitesh K ★★★★★ Now I am able to see like before Doctor Chaitra Jaydev was amazing. I had gone with retina tear issue and had to undergo 2 surgeries but Doctor Chaitra Jaydev made is extremely easy and assured amazing results. Now I am able to see like before. Feels amazing. Highly recommend to visit her and Narayana Nethralaya. Thank you Selva ranga ★★★★★ This is a very good hospital for Ophthalmology This is a very good hospital for Ophthalmology.. I consulted Dr. Bhanumati, Pediatric Ophthalmology.. She has done the eye checkup very well and explained the procedure as well as the future treatment required.. She is a very well experienced doctor and taken very good initiative for the checkup. The hospital process is seamless and the staff are kind enough to guide us through the process, without making us wait endlessly. Uday Vasudev Patient Stories Watch inspiring video testimonials from our patients and see how our care has transformed their lives. View Testimonials Awards &
Recognitions Explore our accolades and achievements that highlight our commitment to excellence and quality in eye care. Explore All Narayana Nethralaya’s Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives Read More Narayana Nethralaya is deeply committed to making a difference to the underprivileged sections of society through our unwavering commitment to make quality eyecare affordable and accessible for all. Cataract screening and surgery Cataract remains the leading cause of blindness in India, affecting millions, especially in underserved and rural communities. Through timely diagnosis and low-cost or free surgical intervention, this condition is not only treatable but entirely preventable — a key focus of our CSR initiatives. Narayana Devalaya Narayana Devalaya is a charitable hospital under Narayana Nethralaya Eye Foundation established with an aim of providing free surgeries, glasses, and medicines to the underprivileged sections of society. It has no cash counters but offers ultramodern operation theatres with services of the best eye surgeons, to BPL cardholders. SMART school screening Regular vision screening for school children is essential to detect and treat conditions such as refractive errors, infections, cataracts, squint, colour blindness, and genetic eye disorders. Our school screening programs are aimed at catching vision problems in children early so that they receive prompt treatment, avoiding long-term complications and preventing vision problems later in life. Eye Banks Dr. Rajkumar Eye Bank and Shankar Anand Singh Eye Bank function under Narayana Nethralaya Eye Foundation. Both were established with the purpose of creating awareness about the importance of eye donation and to facilitate the collection, processing, and distribution of donor eyes to people suffering from corneal blindness. Retinoblastoma Narayana Nethralaya Eye Foundation works in conjunction with Iksha Foundation and Mazumdar Shaw Cancer Centre to provide comprehensive treatment to children with eye cancer. We have a dedicated team of Pediatric Ophthalmologists, Oncologists, Radiologists, Pathologists, Genetic Specialists, Counselors, and Optometrists who work together to ensure the best possible care. KIDROP It is India’s first and the world’s largest telemedicine program to address retinopathy of prematurity and prevent blindness in infants. It is a public-private partnership(PPP) between Narayana Nethralaya and the Government of India and has won the “PPP of the Year” in 2012 and the National Award for Excellence in Health Care for Outreach in Rural Areas in 2016.
